LAW AND MOTION, PLAINTIFF RANDY KENNISON INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA MICROMAGIC BUSINESS SYSTEMS MOTION FOR JOINDER OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION FOR JOINDER OF THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS TO THIS ACTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANTS ARE PARTNERS THAT CAN BIND EACH OTHER UNDER A SEQUENTIAL CONTRACT THEORY. ALSO, BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE WILLING TO ARBITRATE THIS MATTER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302)

Off Calendar Jul-18-2011 Continued To Dec-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motionand Joinder Of Arbitration Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF RANDY KENNISON INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA MICROMAGIC BUSINESS SYSTEMS MOTION FOR JOINDER OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS.

APPEARANCES: Valerie F. Horn, Esq. of Valerie F. Horn & Associates 310/888-8494 for pltf & moving party; Leila Narvid, Esq. of Payne & Fears LLP 738-6842 for deft & opposing party AllscriptsMisys, LLC; Jeffrey M. Galen, Esq. of Galen & Davis LLP 818/986-5685 for deft Synnex.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION FOR JOINDER OF THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS TO THIS ACTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANTS ARE PARTNERS THAT CAN BIND EACH OTHER UNDER A SEQUENTIAL CONTRACT THEORY. ALSO, BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE WILLING TO ARBITRATE THIS MATTER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153

Notice Of Joinder To Motoin To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS SYNNEX CORPORATION, SYNNEX HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS, JOINDER TO MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR A STAY OF PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION.

APPEARANCES: Valerie F. Horn, Esq. of Valerie F. Horn & Associates 310/888-8494 for pltf & opposing party; Leila Narvid, Esq. of Payne & Fears LLP 738-6842 for deft AllscriptsMisys, LLC; Jeffrey M. Galen, Esq. of Galen & Davis LLP 818/986-5685 for deft & moving party Synnex.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Proceedinggs
Off Calendar Apr-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT ALLSCRIPTSMISYS, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR A STAY OF PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION.

APPEARANCES: Valerie F. Horn, Esq. of Valerie F. Horn & Associates 310/888-8494 for pltf & opposing party; Leila Narvid, Esq. of Payne & Fears LLP 738-6842 for deft & moving party AllscriptsMisys, LLC; Jeffrey M. Galen, Esq. of Galen & Davis LLP 818/986-5685 for deft Synnex.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR A STAY OF PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
